title: Workload API — What is a Workload?
text:
The Workload API resource is part of the
scheduling.k8s.io/v1alpha2
API group
and your cluster must have that API group enabled, as well as the
GenericWorkload
feature gate
,
before you can use this API.
A
Workload
is a static, long-lived policy template. It defines what scheduling
policies should be applied to groups of Pods, but does not track runtime state itself.
Runtime scheduling state is maintained by
PodGroup
objects, which controllers create from the
Workload
's
PodGroupTemplates
.
